rag_rules: Fix AGREE syntax errors by ensuring valid semicolon termination and proper block structure.
Place range assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes using visible feature names and concrete bounds.
generic_rules: Use visible identifiers and helper declarations within the same AGREE annex to avoid type resolution errors.
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and their usage in expressions.
Write deterministic dependency guarantees that relate visible inputs to visible outputs.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees must be properly terminated with semicolons.
anti_patterns: Avoid referencing implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
Do not introduce invalid scalar type names; use int, real, and bool consistently.
